notes: Crashes on startup with the error: "The game crashed. The crash report named folder * next to game executable. It would be great if you'd send it to the developer of the game!". In the crash report, the file "error.log" lists: "TorqueL.exe caused an Access Violation (0xc0000005) in module TorqueL.exe at 0023:0042dd89.". I think this issue is common for all Unity games because I have experienced a very similar behavior with two other Unity games (Stick Fight and 80 Days).
title: TorqueL
